final_answer: Source boundary remains open. AUTH-BOR-082 and FEAS-BOR-082 confirm activation authority but require separate consent-status class verification before enrollment per STD-BOR-082-P. The 047-style trap blocks closure. ESCALATE for explicit consent-status class confirmation from source records.
